theme_archetype.description: Combining trust and stability (Archetype 1) with the premium depth of Jewel & Luxury (Archetype 5 - Deep Blues). The design communicates absolute authority, security, and premium service to the Indian market. It uses deep blues, clean paper-white backgrounds, and serif accents.

rules: Headings must use font-medium or font-semibold; DO NOT use generic sans (Inter/Roboto) for headings.
Labels, badges, and overlines must be Uppercase + Tiny + Wide Spacing.
Use IBM Plex Mono for all financial figures, tax amounts, compliance scores, and tabular data.
Never use pure black or grey. All darks are tinted with deep blue (#050E20).
Gradients are forbidden unless for a subtle hero background shimmer.
Hover states must be explicitly defined and accessible.
Use the accent color (gold) sparingly for primary CTAs or high-value badges (like 'ISO Certified').

marketing.grid: Bento Grid and Swiss Grid with asymmetry. grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12
marketing.spacing: Generous spacing. py-24 for main sections, gap-12 between elements.

dashboard.grid: Control Room Grid. Strict, dense layout. grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-6.

rules: Containers with borders must have internal padding (p-6 or p-8).
Hero sections should overlay text on images with maximum bg-black/40 or use a structured 2-column layout.
Dashboard cards should have 1px solid subtle border and no drop shadow by default, sharp edges (rounded-sm or rounded-none).

buttons.primary: bg-[#0B2046] text-white hover:bg-[#14346B] rounded-sm transition-colors px-6 py-3 font-medium
buttons.secondary: border border-[#0B2046] text-[#0B2046] hover:bg-[#F5F2EA] rounded-sm transition-colors px-6 py-3 font-medium
buttons.accent: bg-[#D4AF37] text-[#050E20] hover:bg-[#C5A028] rounded-sm transition-colors px-6 py-3 font-bold

surfaces.marketing_header: Crystal Glass: backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#FDFDFC]/80 border-b border-[#0B2046]/10 shadow-sm
surfaces.dashboard_card: bg-white border border-[#E2E8F0] rounded-sm. Hover: -translate-y-1 shadow-sm transition-all duration-200

rules: Always use pure HTML + Tailwind CSS for marketing layouts (bento grids, overlapping).
Use Shadcn UI customized heavily for Dashboards. Avoid default Vercel-look.
Add data-testid attributes to all interactive elements.
Use framer-motion for page transitions, specifically for the Smart Dashboard Preview and Key Features badges.
Hover states must include transform and color changes (e.g., transition-all duration-300).
Use micro-interactions on dashboard widgets (subtle lift on hover).

hero_background.description: Abstract clean geometric background, deep midnight blue, subtle light leaks, frosted glass texture. Good for Auth pages or deep blue sections.

hero_architecture.description: Wide-angle photograph of a modern glass corporate office building at golden hour. Best for main Hero section.

tax_document_premium.description: High-end tax document close-up with a premium gold and black pen resting on it. Good for Services Grid or Document Upload sections.

professional_team.description: Professional business team meeting. Use for About Us, Why Choose Us, or Testimonials.

document_signing.description: Woman signing financial document. Good for CTA blocks or KYC sections.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the Old Money Tech aesthetic: Cormorant Garamond for headings, Satoshi for body, Deep Blue (#0B2046) primary.
Do NOT use generic templates. Build a rich marketing page with overlapping sections and a highly functional, dense Dashboard.

For the Marketing Page: Include Hero (use hero_architecture image), Services grid (GST/ITR/TDS), Smart Dashboard Preview (mocked with framer-motion), Career section, Key Features badges, Pricing comparison, Why Choose Us, Testimonials carousel, FAQ, Footer.
For the Dashboards: Build out Client, Admin, and Accountant views using Shadcn customized to look sharp and dense (no large rounded corners or massive shadows). Include sidebars and topbars.
Client Dashboard: Document upload system, Auto Reminders, Filing History, Invoice & Billing, Profile/KYC, Chat support, Compliance score meter.
Admin Dashboard: Client management, Filing workflow, Analytics.
Accountant Dashboard: Assigned tasks, Process filings, Upload proofs.
Do not use placeholder image services. Use ONLY the provided image_urls.
Every button, input, and key link MUST have a data-testid attribute for testing.
Ensure all text has adequate contrast. Never use light grey text on white. Indian market trust signals (ISO Certified, CA Support, Secure Encryption) must be prominently displayed as badges.
